name: Home navigation links scroll to their sections

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage (/) as a guest
Click the 'How it works' link in the header navigation
Verify the 'How it works' section is scrolled into view
Click the 'Features' link in the header navigation
Verify the 'FEATURES' section is scrolled into view
Click the 'Home' link in the header navigation
Verify the hero section with 'LEARNING PLATFORM' is back in view
